title: Redstone Tweaks
description: A resource pack made to enhance your redstone experience
body:
# ✨ Redstone Tweaks Redstone Tweaks is a vanilla-style resource pack made to improve your redstone experience. It makes several hidden blockstates visible, adds useful charts in inventories and more!

## 🛠️ Customisation Redstone Tweaks now comes with full ResPackOpts support, allowing you to toggle features and adjust every little detail to your liking. There's an explanation video over on my YouTube channel going over all you need to know! ## ❤️ Like this Pack? I put a lot of passion and effort into creating Redstone Tweaks, so if you decide to use it in your online content (YouTube videos, Twitch streams etc.) I'd be really grateful if you could give it a shout-out or a short mention.
If you want to support me, simply paste the following text into your description: Resource Pack: Redstone Tweaks by RexxStone
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks/ ## 🙏🏻 Credits & Special Thanks Redstone Tweaks is a massive project! Naturally, I took some inspiration and used textures, models and blockstate files from other creators. Go check them all out! - Vanilla Tweaks - Beatso (Little Improvements: Redstone) - CreativityShark (Visual Sensors) - metamilo - KikuGie (initial ResPackOpts config) - [Kyouju_Redstone](https://www.youtube.com/@Kyouju_Redstone) ([Mk.2 Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mk2-redstone)) - [voltavidTony](https://github.com/voltavidTony) ([lang-gen tool](https://github.com/voltavidTony/lang-gen)) - Based on original textures by Mojang Studios - Special thanks to my Discord moderator Junq for helping out with some of the textures! For more info on individual textures and models, check out the "credits.txt" file within the resource pack.
